mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending recession, causing investors to sell equities and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, supporting corporate earnings growth and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive signals yield negative 60d returns in > 55% of cases or interaction term loses statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates expanding manufacturing output and supply chain normalization, which reduces input cost pressures and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no significant positive correlation with INDPRO growth during disinflation periods.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained consumer price index levels above 250 trigger expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive in > 65% of months where CPIAUCSL exceeds 250.0.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirms robust labor market expansion, boosting consumer spending expectations and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to predict positive returns in > 50% of observations or the interaction effect is statistically indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real gross domestic product reflects expanding economic activity and corporate revenue potential, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over any 5-year rolling window or GDP growth shows no predictive power for quarterly equity returns.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below the 105.0 index threshold signals severe manufacturing contraction and supply-side bottlenecks, prompting equity risk-off flows and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in > 60% of instances when INDPRO drops below 105.0.
